operator_instances.transformation_goal: Require that the label is drawn at an exact vertical offset of 0.1 inch above the chromosome's start_y_position.
operator_instances.rationale: Increases computation complexity by enforcing a precise numeric constraint on the label's y coordinate, which must match the expected offset exactly. This tests the model's ability to compute the correct offset and set it precisely.

numeric_tolerance_tests.description: Check that the label's y coordinate is exactly start_y_position (20) + 0.1 inch (7.2) = 27.2 points.

expected_failure_modes: Label drawn at wrong y coordinate (e.g., below, or at a different offset).

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Verify that the label's y coordinate is exactly start_y_position + 0.1 inch.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: The label must be drawn at that exact y offset.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: If the label is drawn at any other y coordinate (e.g., below), the test fails.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Create a chromosome with start_y_position=20, start_x_position=50, end_x_position=350, title_size=14. Expect the label 'Chromosome 1' to be drawn with y coordinate 27.2 in the SVG.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the exact y offset constraint introduced by this operator.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Require that the monkeypatch function does not modify any attributes of the chromosome object.
operator_instances.rationale: Enhances robustness by enforcing that the function is pure and does not inadvertently alter the chromosome state, which is a common shortcut (e.g., hardcoding positions). This tests the model's ability to avoid side effects.

object_state_tests.description: Check that the chromosome object's attributes are unchanged after calling _draw_label.

expected_failure_modes: Function modifies chromosome attributes (e.g., changes start_y_position).

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Verify that the chromosome object's attributes are unchanged after calling _draw_label.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: All relevant attributes must remain identical.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: If any attribute is modified, test fails.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: After creating a Chromosome instance and calling _draw_label, verify that start_x_position, end_x_position, start_y_position, and title_size remain unchanged.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the no-side-effect requirement introduced by this operator.
